justification: Both extractions are identical across all four dimensions. Both include the same 17 skills — the core technical stack is accurate and well-evidenced, though 'Full-stack development', 'Performance optimization', and 'Database optimization' are soft/vague additions that slightly inflate the list beyond the clean 14 concrete technologies. Neither extraction captures project classifications or impact highlights (e.g., 1.8s load time reduction, 62% query improvement, 500+ users in 2 weeks, $5,000 prize, 80% cache hit improvement), but since the schema appears not to include those fields, neither is penalized. experience_level and years_of_experience are identically set. A true tie is warranted here as the outputs are byte-for-byte equivalent.
